ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You will be given a prompt when attaching a task to a goal to input how many points it is worth
ast.target: 在将任务附加到目标时会出现提示，让你输入它值多少积分

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Decides whether to use the monday note or the weekly note (typically in the format eg.2024-W48) to store the data for weekly goals. Daily goals are always stored in the current daily note
ast.target: 决定是使用周一笔记还是周度笔记（通常格式如 2024-W48）来存储每周目标的数据。每日目标始终存储在当前每日笔记中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Should this goal reset daily or weekly
ast.target: 此目标应每日还是每周重置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Value in the file's frontmatter. Note changing this will not update the name in the frontmatter and instead just create a new property
ast.target: 文件 frontmatter 中的值。注意更改此项不会更新 frontmatter 中的名称，而是会创建一个新属性
